stemHtml: A pilot is flying in airspace with no Air Traffic Control service or advisory service being provided. Which of the following actions must be taken if the pilot suffers a receiver failure?

options.a: Precede all transmissions with "Transmitting blind due to receiver failure", transmit reports at scheduled times and repeat each message.
options.b: The first transmission uses “Transmitting blind due to receiver failure” spoken twice and subsequent transmissions are all simple location reports.
options.c: The first transmission uses “Transmitting blind due to receiver failure” spoken twice and no other transmissions will be made unless you are changing frequency.
options.d: Precede the first transmission using “Transmitting blind due to receiver failure” spoken twice and no other transmissions will be made unless you are changing level or heading.
